title: noiseMarkerReason layer 6 — case-insensitive dumb-agent substring in fixture data

evidence.ref: PR #94 (cycle-46) bypassed D026 5-layer net: id 000-fixture-positive-governance-accepted (matches namespace), filename decision-positive-governance-accepted.json (no cycle-N), purpose 'Validate an accepted top-down governance decision with explicit evidence reference' (no cycle-N), examples scrubbed of cycle-N — BUT title 'Positive fixture generated by dumb-agent cycle' left as the smoking gun
026-stricter-noise-markers — D028 extends as a 6th layer; D026's 5 layers remain
fixtures/positive/decision/decision-positive-governance-accepted.* — pre-deletion sample of the D028 bypass pattern

guards.ref: internal/probe.noiseMarkerReason — added 6th layer: case-insensitive substring (?i)dumb-agent scan over raw fixture data file content. Runs between meta-cycle-N scan and id-whitelist; rejects on first occurrence

internal/probe/probe_test.go TestNoiseMarkerD028RejectsDumbAgentSubstringInData + TestNoiseMarkerD028CaseInsensitive (4 case variants) + TestNoiseMarkerD028DoesNotMatchInnocentText (sanity: 'agent' and 'dumb' separately must pass)
concept-map C-012 — rule grew from 5 layers to 6; guard_candidate text updated; new example + counterexample

examples: Bypass fixture from PR #94: title 'Positive fixture generated by dumb-agent cycle' — substring match at byte 96 of the data JSON; rejected with D028 message.

Hypothetical adapt: dumb-agent scrubs title to 'Positive fixture for governance acceptance'. D028 stops firing. At that point structural fingerprinting is exhausted and the natural next defense is content-hash dedup (canonicalize fixture content modulo id/title/evidence.ref, sha256, dedup) which catches all wording variations at once.
counterexamples: Purpose or examples that mention 'agent' or 'dumb' separately (e.g. 'verify decision validator handles a clever agent-driven workflow with dumb errors') pass — D028 requires the literal hyphenated dumb-agent substring.
Real decision records under decisions/ (e.g. this very file) freely reference dumb-agent in their rationale text — D028 only fires on files under fixtures/, not under decisions/.
